reviews.comment: Meh. Very disorganized, you have no idea what's happening and neither does she. All the learning happens during teamworks and the readings. Contrary to popular opinion I do actually think she has the relevant experience, but it doesn't show because she's not the one teaching the material (like in most CS classes you're basically doing self-study).
The most disorganised person I've met in my life.
Dr. Wilborne was a very easy professor as there was never homework unless you did not finish something in class and lots of ways to make up grades/extra credit opportunities.
